message:
ui: live-mode topbar indicator + Browse renders live data

Iteration 15. Two visible improvements that close the live-mode loop —
the user can now see at-a-glance whether the console is talking to a
real mcp-server, and the Backends page swaps fixture rows for server-
reported rows once the live wire returns.

ui/src/components/screens.jsx — Topbar
  - New live-mode pill replacing the static
    'https://rulake.ruv.net/mcp · JWT · scope:read,publish' string.
    Subscribes to the rulake:live-connected CustomEvent fired by
    ConnectScreen.test() on a successful initialize. Renders:
      ● LIVE · <host>     when window.RULakeActiveClient exists
      ○ DEMO · no live MCP otherwise
    The host comes from `new URL(endpoint).host` so the pill stays
    one line at any endpoint length. The pill carries a `data-mode`
    attribute (`"live"` / `"demo"`) the smoke script asserts on, and
    a title showing the truncated session id for hover-detail.

ui/src/components/screens.jsx — BrowseScreen
  - When window.RULakeLiveCollections is populated by a successful
    Browse.refresh in live mode, the table swaps fixture rows for
    server-reported (backend, collection) pairs. The crumb header
    flips from "all collections" to "live · N backends".
  - Subscribes to the rulake:store CustomEvent (existing append-audit
    bus) so the table re-renders when a new wire round-trip lands.
  - Server-reported entries currently lack dim/gen/entries/witness
    (the v0.1 ListCollectionsResponse only carries id; v0.2 will
    extend CollectionEntry with those fields). The table's hits/miss/
    state columns degrade gracefully ("—") rather than synthesizing
    fake numbers.

ui/scripts/smoke.sh — --live phase
  - New 8th assertion: query `.endpoint-pill[data-mode]` after the
    Connect.test live phase, assert `live`. Catches the case where
    Connect succeeds wire-side but the topbar fails to react.

E2E validated this iteration:
    $ ./scripts/smoke.sh --live
      ▸ build                                ✓
      ▸ preview                              ✓
      ▸ mcp-server (live)                    ✓ (CORS preflight 204)
      ▸ browser session                      ✓
      ▸ bootstrap                            ✓
      ▸ action chain                         ✓ × 7
      ▸ audit ledger                         ✓ × 7 codes
      ▸ topbar data-mode=live                ✓ (NEW)
      ▸ console errors                       ✓
      ✓ smoke green

Tri-mode visibility now complete:
  Demo            — sidebar audit count, default fixture data
  WASM-local      — IPFS toggle + ipfs-probe + bundle verify, all
                    persisted via IndexedDB; console feels local
  Live (MCP)      — topbar pill flips, Backends page swaps to
                    server-reported data, audit ledger picks up
                    INIT_OK + LIST_COLLECTIONS_OK rows

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -273,6 +273,15 @@ expect_substr CONNECT_FAILED
 if [[ "$RUN_LIVE" -eq 1 ]]; then
   expect_substr INIT_OK
   expect_substr LIST_COLLECTIONS_OK
+
+  # Topbar live-indicator: data-mode attribute flips to "live" once
+  # the active client is pinned by ConnectScreen.test.
+  TOPBAR_MODE=$(npx --yes agent-browser eval "document.querySelector('.endpoint-pill')?.getAttribute('data-mode') || 'absent'" 2>&1 | tr -d '"' | tr -d ' ')
+  if [[ "$TOPBAR_MODE" == "live" ]]; then
+    ok "topbar data-mode=live (live indicator visible)"
+  else
+    err "topbar data-mode=$TOPBAR_MODE (expected live)"
+  fi
 fi
 
 hdr "console errors"
